# Harshal Dasani

> Business Head at INVasset PMS & AIF (Mumbai). Markets professional and writer. CFA candidate, CA Level II cleared. Featured in 1,045+ media features across 145+ publications in 8 languages. Topics: Indian equity markets, commodities, macros, geopolitics.

## Primary pages

- [About, Harshal Dasani](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/): personal page with bio, stats and links to social channels.
- [Media Features Tracker](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/tracker/): live searchable database of every article, interview and quote across 145+ publications.
- [Markets with Harshal Blog](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/blog/): long-form notes on stock markets, commodities, macros, geopolitics, interviews and media features.
- [Harshal Dasani at INVasset PMS](https://harshaldasani.pages.dev/blog/posts/harshal-dasani-invasset/): profile page for Harshal Dasani's role and market themes.
